title: Wet Dream Succubus
description:
After jerking himself to death from excessive masturbation, a shameless pervert awakens in Hell and is recruited as the newest low-ranked Succubus. Instead of torture, his “punishment” is to serve the Demon Lord by infiltrating human dreams and collecting wet dreams.

As the Wet Dream Succubus, you sneak into people’s most suppressed desires — from secret crushes on best friends and tentacle fetishes, to prison bukkake fantasies, public beach exhibitionism, boss-employee lust, and many more depraved dreams.

Progress through 40 challenging match-3 puzzle stages, advance the story through seductive chapter dialogue, and unlock hand-drawn CG reward scenes that expand your personal gallery of lewd dream encounters.
description_short: A lewd match-3 puzzle game where you play as a rookie Succubus collecting wet dreams and corrupting humans through their deepest desires. Unlock seductive hand-drawn CGs as you progress.
